notes: Text-only adjudication: tables list is empty, no figure image files on disk (data/figures/local/PMC10042811/ absent), supplementary_text is only a table-of-contents. Core correctly captured: organoid_type cerebral, iPSC source WT1-G (real WT line), Matrigel, mTeSR1, SMADi factors LDN193189 0.1 uM + SB431542 10 uM (verbatim), ROCK inhibitor Y-27632, KnockOut SR 20% and bFGF 10 ng/mL (valid alt iPSC medium), split 1:10 / interval 5 d. Two correctness problems: (1) cross-protocol contamination — FBS, L-glutamine, NEAA, β-mercaptoethanol, pen/strep are pulled from the DMEM medium used for the HEK-293/HEK-293T/LNZ308 immortalized cell lines, not the iPSC/hESC/organoid lineage; (2) passaging.method 'mechanical' is unsupported (source states no method; only Accutase is named, and that for astrocytes). No ESC->iPSC mislabel detected (WT1-G is correctly iPSC). Notable recall gaps: 37 °C / 5% CO2, NPC and astrocyte media, astrocyte Accutase 1:3 weekly passaging, full timeline (EB d5, rosette d14, astrocyte d75), validation markers, and the H1 hESC WA01 second source. The actual cerebral-organoid 3D protocol is only loosely described in the source body (formed in ~1 month 3D culture, ~1.5 mm transplanted), which limits extractable organoid-specific detail.
